meaning: n.微小的东西,<口>小孩,力所能及的微小贡献
examples: ladybird larvae are among the biggest friends we gardeners have. They're ferocious predators on problem whitefly and red spider mite.
But this can also get a mite tedious.
Old pillows are rich in mite dung and human skin flakes.
Did it not wonder whether Mr Roeder's remarks about re-Germanising the east were, well, a mite sensitive?
It seems, perhaps, a mite exaggerated: furious fights over the census are as old as the census itself.
